market_pulse: Saturday night momentum strong across Strip venues with David Guetta headlining LIV Beach; Zouk capitalizing on hip-hop pull with Lil Tune Chi and Snoop Dogg week activity driving high engagement.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: David Guetta tonight at LIV Beach draws premium day-club demographic
Lil Tune Chi and Snoop Dogg performances at Zouk this weekend indicate strong hip-hop cross-appeal
OMNIA hosting De Orro (5/8) and Cedric Gervais (5/9) with Deseo Latin Sundays activation
Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesdays gaining traction; Justin Credible/Laidback Luke momentum
Tao Beach EDC week residency posts showing April activity; expected May calendar updates
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on Saturday night peak with agile IG story content showing live crowd energy; consider targeted TT creator callouts for tomorrow (Sunday) to extend weekend leg. Monitor OMNIA Latin Sundays positioning — trending upward vs LIV Beach Latin demographic.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Zouk, Hakkasan) feature rotating hip-hop/R&B headliners; LIV leaning heavily EDM/tech-house with only indirect hip-hop via influencer mentions.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Negotiate hip-hop guest appearances or blend residencies (tech-house host, hip-hop satellite nights) to capture Zouk's weekend cross-genre audience; test hip-hop TT audio trends.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA running dedicated 'Deseo Latin Sundays' with integrated brand + DJ rotation; LIV Beach has high Spanish-language engagement but no branded Latin series.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch LIV Beach 'Verano Nights' Latin series on Fridays; feature local Latin DJs + influencer UGC; amplify via TT Latin hashtags (#latinclub #vegaslatino).

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting sunrise/pool recovery content; LIV posts show strong day-club action but minimal sunrise/chill-zone storytelling.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop 'Golden Hour' IG Reels series: pool-side sunrise transitions, chill vibes, recovery drinks — target post-party demographic.
